resources.string: Amasevisi e-Google Play awakutholakali.
Akukho ukuthenga okutholakele. Ingabe usebenzisa i-akhawunti efanele?
Iphutha le-Google Play
Kube nephutha ku-Google Play. Sicela uzame futhi ngemuva kwesikhathi noma uqalise kabusha ifoni yakho.\n\nIphutha: %s
Iphutha Lokukhokha le-Google Play
Kube nephutha lapho kucelwa ku-Google Play imininingwane yokuthenga kwakho. Sula inqolobane ye-Google Play bese uqalisa kabusha ifoni yakho.\n\nIphutha %s
Usuvele wathenga?

I-Google Play ibika ukuthi usuvele unalolu shintsho olusheshisiwe, kodwa alukwazanga ukubuyiselwa. Qinisekisa ukuthi usebenzisa i-akhawunti ye-Google owathenga ngayo. Ukuvumelanisa kwe-Play Store kungase kuthathe isikhathi — zama ukuqala kabusha idivayisi, ukususa i-cache ye-Google Play noma ulinde nje.
Buyisela ukuthenga
Pro
I-CAPod yenziwe umuntu oyedwa. Ukuthuthukisa kuvula izici ezengeziwe futhi kusize ukugcina uhlelo lokusebenza luphila.
Izici ezifanayo, amanani ahlukene. Ukubhalisa kufaka ukuzama kwamahhala futhi kungakhanselwa noma nini.
Izici ezifanayo, amanani ahlukene. Ukubhalisa kungakhanselwa noma nini.
Qala ukuzama kwamahhala
Bhalisa minyaka yonke
%s/unyaka
Thenga kanye
Ukuthenga kube kanye: %s
Buyisela ukuthenga
Akukho ukuthenga okutholakele. Ingabe usebenzisa i-akhawunti efanele?
Uma usanda kuthenga, kungase kuthathe isikhashana ukuze i-Google Play ivumelanise.
Zama futhi emizuzwini embalwa uma ukuthenga kwakho kungabonakali.
Qinisekisa ukuthi ungene ngemvume nge-akhawunti ye-Google efanayo eyasetshenziswa ekutheneni.
Ama-akhawunti amaningi angadunga i-Google Play. Ukufaka uhlelo lokusebenza ngewebhusayithi ye-Google Play kuphoqa ukuhlobanisa ne-akhawunti ethile.
Usuvele wathenga i-Pro?
Kubonakala sengathi wake wathuthukisela ku-Pro kule divayisi ngaphambili. Buyisela ukuthenga kwakho ukuze uyivule futhi.
Ukuthenga kubuyiselwe.
Isimo sibukeka singalungile?
Uma unalo ushintsho olusheshisiwe olungaboniswa lapha, buyisela ukuthenga kwakho.
Une-CAPod Pro!
Kuvulwe ukubhalisa kwakho. Siyabonga ngokusekela i-CAPod!
Kuvulwe ukuthenga kwakho okwenziwa kanye. Siyabonga ngokusekela i-CAPod!
Ukubhalisa kwaminyaka yonke
Ukubhalisa kwakho kuyasebenza futhi kuhlelelwe ukuvuselelwa. Ukukhokhiswa kuphathwa yi-Google Play.
Ukubhalisa kwakho kuyasebenza, kodwa akuhlelelwe ukuvuselelwa. I-Pro ihlala itholakala kuze kuphele isikhathi samanje.
Ukuthenga kube kanye
Ngokwakho kuze kube phakade. Akukho ukuvuselelwa, akukho ukuphelelwa isikhathi.
Unalo ukuthenga okwenziwe kanye, kodwa ukubhalisa kwakho kusahlelelwe ukuvuselelwa. Kukhansele ku-Google Play ukuze ugweme ukukhokha kabili.
Phatha ukubhalisa
Shintshela ekuthengeni okwenziwa kanye
Kutholakala uma ukubhalisa kwakho kungasahlelelwe ukuvuselelwa. Kukhansele ku-Google Play ukuze ushintshe.
Lokhu kuwukuthenga okuhlukile — akukhanseli noma akubuyiseli imali yokubhalisa kwakho. Sebenzisa i-akhawunti ye-Google efanayo.
Ukubhalisa kusasebenza
Ukubhalisa kwakho kusahlelelwe ukuvuselelwa. Kuqale ukhansele ku-Google Play, bese ushintshela ekuthengeni okwenziwa kanye. Usanda kukhansela? Nika i-Google Play isikhashana bese uzama futhi.
Ukuhlolwa kokubhalisa kuhlulekile
Akukwazanga ukuhlola isimo sokubhalisa kwakho ku-Google Play. Ukuze ugweme ukuthenga kabili, zama futhi ngesikhashana.
Kuqinisekiswa ukuthenga kwakho
I-Google Play ayikaqinisekisi ukuthenga kwakho. I-Pro isasebenza — akudingeki sinyathelo.

I-Google Play ayikaqinisekisi ukuthenga kwakho isikhathi eside. I-Pro isasebenza. Qinisekisa ukuthi ukuxhunyiwe ku-inthanethi futhi ungenile nge-akhawunti ye-Google eyasetshenziswa ekutheneni, bese uzama ukubuyisela.
